description: User switches from the Google search results tab to the Askable Sessions tab to review instructions.
frame_description: The screen shows the Askable Sessions interface with a message reminding the participant to think aloud.

description: User switches back from the Askable Sessions tab to the Google search results tab.
frame_description: The browser returns to the Google search results page for the query 'webjet'.

description: User hovers the cursor over the first organic search result for Webjet.
interaction_target: Webjet | Your go-to for going places.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the main link of the first search result.

description: User clicks on the Webjet search result link.
interaction_target: Webjet | Your go-to for going places.
frame_description: The link is activated, and the browser begins to navigate away from Google.

description: The browser navigates to the Webjet homepage.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The Webjet homepage loads, showing a large hero image and a flight search widget on the right.

description: The flight search widget fully renders and becomes interactive.
frame_description: The search widget is now visible with fields for 'Leaving from', 'Going to', and dates.

description: User clicks into the 'Leaving from' input field to begin searching for a departure city.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the 'Leaving from' text box.

description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears above the 'Leaving from' field.
frame_description: A list of suggested airports appears above the input field.

description: User types 'sun' into the 'Leaving from' field.
frame_description: The characters 'sun' appear in the input field as the user types.

description: The autocomplete suggestions update to show locations matching 'sun'.
frame_description: The dropdown list refreshes to show 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' and other related results.

description: User selects the Sunshine Coast airport from the autocomplete list.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Sunshine Coast option in the dropdown list.

description: User types 'lon' into the 'Going to' input field.
frame_description: The user types the destination into the second search field.
A dropdown menu appears above the 'Going to' field with London airport options.

description: User selects 'All Airports (LON)' for London from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'All Airports' option for London.

description: User hovers over the 'One Way' tab in the flight search widget.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'One Way' selection tab.

description: The search form updates to a one-way trip layout.
frame_description: The return date field disappears from the search widget.

description: User switches back to the Askable Sessions tab.
frame_description: The browser switches to the instruction tab.

description: User switches back to the Webjet tab to continue the task.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The browser returns to the Webjet flight search page.
